tools.name: search_care_resources
tools.description: Search public Sandwich channels, guides, reports, answers, glossary terms, and tools for aging-parent and sandwich-generation care planning.

tools.name: get_channel
tools.description: Return metadata and canonical links for one public Sandwich channel by slug.

tools.name: calculate_long_term_care_cost
tools.description: Estimate long-term care cost by U.S. state, care type, years, and annual inflation using Sandwich's CareScout 2025 dataset.
